violations.description: Ensure the contrast between foreground and background colors meets WCAG 2 AA minimum contrast ratio thresholds
violations.help: Elements must meet minimum color contrast ratio thresholds

any.message: Element has insufficient color contrast of 3.96 (foreground color: #767b85, background color: #f7f7f8, font size: 9.0pt (12px), font weight: normal). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1

violations.description: Ensure touch targets have sufficient size and space
violations.help: All touch targets must be 24px large, or leave sufficient space

any.message: Target has insufficient size (48px by 6px, should be at least 24px by 24px)

relatedNodes.html: <button class="slopcar-dot" type="button" role="tab" aria-label="Show slop 4 of 7" aria-selected="false"></button>

any.message: Target has insufficient space to its closest neighbors. Safe clickable space has a diameter of 7.4px instead of at least 24px.

nodes.html: <button class="slopcar-dot" type="button" role="tab" aria-label="Show slop 1 of 7" aria-selected="true"></button>
nodes.failureSummary:

  Target has insufficient space to its closest neighbors. Safe clickable space has a diameter of 7.4px instead of at least 24px.
